title: Morphic
description: Set up your morphology through a quick setup (size, weight, strength, speed, stamina) and play with your uniq profile.
body:
Play as a dwarf! (or an elf...) Morphic allow players to set up their morphology through a quick setup. Chose your size, weight, strength, speed, stamina, flexibility and water affinity to get your final profile. > It looks mostly cosmetic BUT the changes, even being reasonnable, can change a lot of your gameplay. A single centimeter can makes you unable to pass through doors, or able to sneak into a one-block tunnel. ## Playable Classes - **Primary**: vanilla, man, woman, teenager, child - **Shapes**: olympic, strongman, ironman, giant, obese - **Fantasy**: dwarf, elf, orc, vampire, navi, fairy, astartes ## Features - Morphology is set to vanilla by default (no modification) - Every player get 1 token on their first connection (require admin to get more) - Every stat modify your attributes - Every stat has a drawback (ex: strong profiles lead to more hunger, weak profiles lead to low damage output) - The datapack has been made to match discrete changes. In the opposite, extreme profiles may struggle to survive. ## Procedure - Start the setup using (require 1 token) (public command) ```/trigger Morphic.Setup``` - **info** if you don't have any token (and are admin), get more with: (replace with your name in the command) ```/scoreboard players add PLAYER_NAME fkmpc.tokens 5``` - click on **[​start your character]** or click the **[​presets list]** button - follow the steps and use the buttons at the end of the dialogs to navigate - to set a stat, click the **[pen]** to get the command in the chat, then change the value at the end and valid the command - your stats are modified at each steps - when your are OK, click on the **[green check_box]** on the last step to permanently validate your profile (otherwise, you will lost the morphology on death) (watch the video for a live example) ### Ideas... - role playing, adding a bit of personality in your avatar - completing a parkour map with a dwarf body - kill the enderdragon as an obese character (hardcore) - eating the whole planet as an orc - ... ## Datapack's Options In game, use: ```/function fkmpc:options/get```

Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
Mod Version Mod packaging is designed to be more convenient for your installations. Executed on the server side, it does not need to be installed on the client side. Keep in mind that inside the mod is simply a datapack. In addition, interactions between too many mods can degrade the functioning of one or more mods.
